title: Select columns per board OR individual group in a board
excerpt: We would LOVE to see an update where you could chose a column type for the entire board OR  to only be on one specific group or subcategory group. It is very distracting to only need a column in one section of a board an…

posts.author: mposeysocial (Megan Posey)
posts.cookedHtml: We would LOVE to see an update where you could chose a column type for the entire board OR to only be on one specific group or subcategory group. It is very distracting to only need a column in one section of a board and have it show up on the entire board with no way to adjust it.
